criteria.name: README accurate

criteria.name: Repo shape clean
criteria.evidence: test_repo_shape.py passes — all root files and dirs match whitelist.

criteria.name: analysis.ipynb location
criteria.evidence: analysis.ipynb exists at repo root (ROOT / 'analysis.ipynb') as expected by test_deliverables.py and test_analysis_notebook.py.

criteria.name: 11 done-definition items met
criteria.evidence: 113 tests pass across pipeline, FWI, Stanhope, redundancy, uncertainty, deliverables, and polish. All done-definition items covered by passing tests.

summary: Phase 11 polish review: all 6 criteria pass. README is accurate, repo is clean, notebook is correctly located, full test suite passes with 0 failures.
